case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. FRANK MOTTA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTTA, FRANK $2,638.01 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,931.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62901144)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62901144) AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTA, FRANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTA, FRANK DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2019
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62901144) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
NOTICE OF INTENTION TO INCUR COURT COSTS AND LEGAL FEES BY FILING SUIT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1033 (B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 62901144) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 64712180) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTA, FRANK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039053), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED OCT-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-25-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MOTTA, FRANK
